tiebreakers.head_to_head: Number of games won between tied players
tiebreakers.wins_as_black: Number of games won while playing black
tiebreakers.sonneborn_berger: Sum of points earned by all opponents you won/drew against
tiebreakers.buchholz_cut1: Sum of all opponents' scores excluding the lowest
tiebreakers.direct_encounter: Result of direct games between tied players
